steps.title: Target a counterexample
steps.content: The students claimed broken-wing display is exclusive to shorebirds. Evidence weakens that claim only if it shows birds outside the shorebird order also performing broken-wing display.

steps.title: Test the data statements
steps.content: A stays within Charadriiformes, so it does not challenge exclusivity. B says two birds do not perform the display. C supports the pattern by pairing a shorebird that performs it with a non-shorebird that does not. Non-shorebirds performing it weaken the claim. The answer is D.
